_comment_repositories: Default official repositories used by void-mklive to resolve different architectures. Only these three should be active by default.
_comment_custom_repositories: To add your own repositories, insert them in the 'custom_repositories' array. Example: ["https://my-repo.com/voidlinux"]
_comment_priority: Repository priority: XBPS evaluates repositories in the declared order (command line -R/--repository first, then profiles/custom_repositories, and finally base official repositories). The first package match is the one that will be installed.
